title: The Road to the Rooftop Opens
description: On pages 12–15, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Luffy, Yamato, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #15, Big Mom as The raid reaches its decisive stage as the Tobiroppo are revealed, Yamato remembers Ace, and the Worst Generation reaches the rooftop to face Kaido and Big Mom.
scene: The raid reaches its decisive stage as the Tobiroppo are revealed, Yamato remembers Ace, and the Worst Generation reaches the rooftop to face Kaido and Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're bonkers if you think you can get through here easily!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: By now, the Samurai are probably all dead!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All that's left now is to kill Kozuki doesn't son,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: And this battle will be over!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you really think that, then you're in for a mean surprise......!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Right now you guys are facing off against the "New Generation"!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Shut your trap! You little bird bastard!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: What!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Big... big bro...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Big bro Luffy is...!!

dialogue.speaker: Yamato
dialogue.text: ACE'S LITTLE BROTHER!!!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh no! I was so harsh to big bro Luffy earlier!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's alright!! If it really bothered him, he would have said something back to you.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But more importantly, let's do it!! The plan you laid out!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: WHAA...!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: He was Roger's son...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: And Luffy's Big Brother!!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Is that really true.....!!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You were the ones who brought Luffy to Wano, weren't you!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Indeed...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There are as many pirates as there are stars in the sky...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and among all of them, somehow HE was the one you met and brought to this country....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't think of this as anything else but fate!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: I mean even his name...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Carries the initials of "D".

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Fire~ taste!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: So good!! These flames are delish!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Crackle Crackle Crackle

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: BURP....! I'm stuffed too!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: CHAR-GING- COM-PLETEED

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom
dialogue.text: Ha-hahaha mamamamama... is strawhat not here yet?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Hey! Kaido!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't care how many of them you kill, but...

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: Make sure to leave nice Robin alive!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I thought your daughter from the three-eyed tribe could read the ancient texts...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh, pudding? I can't wait any longer for her true awakening...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Where are you planning on dropping this island anyway?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Mamamama!! Aren't they in the middle of a festival? Quite a lot are gonna die...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't care. It's easy enough to obtain more slaves..."

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wororo!!! I'd make for a great capital for new onighsima.

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: Is the "Road PoneGlyph" there?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Isn't it too early for you to be showing your true colors?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: DON'T BELITTLE ME!! EVEN NOW...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I still think of you as a little brother!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: On that day, at God Valley, when the "Rocks Pirates" fell to ruin...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I was the one who gave you your mythical type "fish-fish fruit"!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You owe me a life- long debt!! Kaido!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Say whatever you want. We can settle all of that after...

summary: This section advances the Wano - The Worst Generation Reaches the Roof storyline with 48 dialogue beats. The raid reaches its decisive stage as the Tobiroppo are revealed, Yamato remembers Ace, and the Worst Generation reaches the rooftop to face Kaido and Big Mom.
